description_long: This is a futuristic, angular airplane with a predominantly blue body accented by gold and white geometric patterns. The wings are sharply swept back and feature gold-colored panels and red cylindrical elements, possibly representing weaponry or engine components. The fuselage is sleek and streamlined, with a canopy-style cockpit situated at the front and highlighted by black-tinted windows. The tail section is split into two vertical stabilizers, each with gold tips and blue striping, and the rear features additional swept surfaces for stability. The underside of the wings displays red and black cylindrical pods, likely representing engines or armaments. The overall design suggests a high-speed, advanced aircraft suitable for urban or sci-fi environments.
description: A sleek, blue and gold futuristic airplane with swept-back wings, dual vertical stabilizers, and a forward canopy cockpit.
description_view_0: Front view shows the angular nose, forward canopy, and the full span of the swept-back wings with gold accents and red cylindrical pods.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the low, flat profile, the blue and gold striping, and the arrangement of the rear stabilizers and wing-mounted pods.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the split tail with dual vertical stabilizers, gold-tipped surfaces, and the central exhaust or engine port.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the streamlined fuselage, wing configuration, and the placement of the red and black pods.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with sharply swept wings and pronounced anhedral angle; features wingtip extensions and integrated pods.
attribute_engine_type: Quad jet engines, two mounted under each wing near the tips.
attribute_tail_design: H-tail configuration with dual vertical stabilizers and horizontal stabilizers extending from the rear fuselage.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single canopy and black-tinted windows.
